question: Do children outgrow food allergies, and which ones are most likely to resolve?
topic: Provides crucial information to correct assumptions about food allergy prognosis that affects long-t

discovery_sources.text: 80% of children outgrow egg and milk allergies by early elementary school - plausible figure, warrants verification
discovery_sources.origin: Unbiased Science: Food Allergies: A Tough Nut to Crack

discovery_sources.text: Only 20% of children outgrow peanut allergies, barely 10% outgrow tree nut allergies - specific percentages should be verified against current literature
